## Agent Role
<!-- Which agent role would own this skill? e.g. "Implementation Engineer", "Sales Development Rep" -->

## Skill Name
<!-- A short, verb-noun slug. e.g. "stakeholder-update-writer", "contract-risk-reviewer" -->

## Department
<!-- Which department does this agent belong to? e.g. Engineering, Sales, Legal -->

## Why It's Missing
<!-- What gap does this skill fill? Why can't an existing skill cover it? -->

## Example Use Case
<!-- Describe a concrete situation where an agent would invoke this skill. 2-4 sentences. -->
